name: Willard Scott's Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
Bake:
1. Cream butter and shortening in a large bowl.
2. Add eggs, one at a time, creaming after each addition.
3. Incorporate sugar.
4. Sift flour and baking powder together.
5. Alternately add flour mixture and milk to the batter.
6. Grease and flour a 10-inch bundt pan.
7. Bake for 1-1/4 to 1-1/2 hours at 325°F.
Frosting:
1. Toast pecans in butter in a broiler pan until well browned, then cool slightly.
2. Add powdered sugar and enough milk to achieve a spreading consistency.
3. Spread frosting on top of the cake. Some should drip down the sides and center, but spread only on top.
